source.description: "haus" for Haus-owned items; "curated" for approved external items.

version.description: haus package version when the row was written.

catalogRef.description: Git ref (tag or branch) the catalog was fetched from at install time. Matches HAUS_CATALOG_REF env var, defaults to 'main'.

hash.description: sha256 digest of installed files listed in paths (see src/update/hash-installed.ts); placeholder when paths is empty.

originSourceId.description: For source:"curated" items — references the sourceId from sources.yaml.

useMode.description: How the upstream item was incorporated.

license.description: SPDX license identifier of the upstream source, e.g. "MIT".

riskLevel.description: Risk level assessed during curation review.

reviewStatus.description: Curation review gate status. Only approved items are installed.
